name: Demonic Episode
short_description: Forgotten seals are breaking, and ancient demons awaken. You and your team are the last line between humanity and damnation. Face the ancient evil with up to four players, complete the ritual and banish the demons back to hell once and for all.
detailed_description:
Forgotten seals are breaking. Ancient demons awaken. And you are the last to stand against them.

Story

Once, priests waged war not against flesh and blood but against evil itself, armed with prayers and ancient rituals.

Yet some demons were too powerful to ever be exorcised.

Sealed within forgotten crypts, they rested for centuries... until now.

Now they awaken. Fed by humanity’s corruption  by every sin, every cruelty. The seals are breaking, and the power of the demons rises from the darkness.


And you are the last ones who can stop the darkness!

Gameplay

Demonic Episode is an intense 4-player co-op horror experience where you and your team enter cursed Lost Places to find, weaken, and banish the evil back to Hell once and for all.

  • Next-Generation Co-op Horror: Play online with up to four players or face the nightmare alone.

  • Dynamic Lost Places: Every mission is different. The demon, phenomena, ritual site, level layout, the weather and puzzles are all randomly generated. No run ever feels the same.

  • Three Phases of Damnation:

    • The Awakening: Discover the demon’s crypt and solve the ancient rune puzzle to break its seal.

    • The Hunt: The demon is unleashed. Survive its relentless pursuit and weaken it by performing a blood ritual with its corrupted minion.

    • The Banishment: Prepare the final ritual, uncover the clues, and send the demon back to Hell or fall to the darkness.

  • Four Classes, One Goal: Choose from unique characters with special abilities - from the spiritual medium to the light technician.

Your weapons are courage, intellect, and teamwork and only they decide who lives to see the sunrise.

Replayability

No run is ever the same.

Each map changes, and every encounter writes a new episode of your survival.

The demon, map layout, phenomena, ritual site, the weather and puzzles are all procedurally generated, every mission will test you in new ways.

Experience teamwork, panic, and the moment when everything is on the line.

Master the Darkness

Level up and earn Soul Coins to unlock powerful Perks that increase your odds against the forces of evil.

Choose from six tiers of abilities, strengthen your team, and become the ultimate hunters of Hell.

Are you ready to take demon hunting to the next level?

supported_languages:
English*, German
*languages with full audio support
